title: Cannot Reset Password via Email Link
description: Customer reports that the password reset link sent to email is expired immediately and does not allow them to set a new password.

title: Double Charged for Single Order
description: Customer was charged twice for the same order but only one transaction appears in the order history.

title: Profile Photo Not Uploading
description: Customer attempts to upload a profile photo but it spins indefinitely and never saves the new image.

title: Cart Items Disappearing After Login
description: Customer adds items to cart while browsing, but all items are removed once they log into their account.

title: Refund Not Processed After 7 Days
description: Customer returned an item over 7 days ago and has not received the refund despite receiving a return confirmation email.

title: Order Confirmation Email Going to Spam
description: Customer reports that all transactional emails including order confirmations are being delivered to the spam folder.

title: Promo Code Not Applying at Checkout
description: Customer enters a valid promo code at checkout but receives an invalid code error and no discount is applied.

title: Product Images Not Loading on Mobile
description: Customer reports that all product images appear broken on mobile devices while they load fine on desktop.

title: Account Locked After Single Wrong Password
description: Customer entered the wrong password once and their account was immediately locked, not allowing any further login attempts.

title: Search Results Showing Irrelevant Products
description: Customer searches for specific product names but results show completely unrelated items with no way to filter accurately.

title: Address Not Saving During Checkout
description: Customer fills in their shipping address at checkout but the form resets after clicking continue, forcing them to re-enter details repeatedly.

title: Live Chat Support Not Responding
description: Customer initiated a live chat session and waited over 30 minutes with no agent joining the conversation.
